content_fingerprint: deepseek v4 targets agent workflows with million token context window deepseek s latest model ships with a one million token context length designed specifically for multi step agentic tasks a capability that the company claims is practically usable rather than merely theoretical deepseek has published a blog post on hugging face detailing its deepseek v4 model highlighting a one million token context window engineered for real world agent deployments the post frames the context length as a practical feature for agents that must reason across large document collections codebases or multi turn
